executive_summary: US-Iran Islamabad talks collapsed Saturday night (Vance departed after 21 hours) eliminating the principal bearish catalyst for gold and BTC simultaneously. Real-time F&G is 15 (Extreme Fear) — a historically strong contrarian accumulation signal contradicted by $240M institutional BTC ETF inflows. CPI at 3.3% (22-month high) and gold/silver ratio at 62.7x (vs historical norm 50-55x) create the highest-conviction materials setup of the year. The evening portfolio expands to 7 picks and raises materials allocation to 25%, adding Silver at #4 (best R:R in portfolio at 3.8:1). Hard RSI/revenue gates correctly excluded AMD, AMZN, BAC, JPM, NFLX, AVGO, and TSLA from new positions.
